title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
